feed.title: Journal of China Computer-Assisted Language Learning
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Journal of China Computer-Assisted Language Learning (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Online language teaching in times of change: a CALL to action for language teachers and educators
entry.summary: Authors: Ursula Stickler DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2024-0010 Pages: Page range: 1-17

entry.title: Theory-supported corpus pedagogy for ESL pre-service teachers: using Parallel EAP Corpora for language learning
entry.summary: Authors: Jiahao Yan, Qing Ma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2024-0016 Pages: Page range: 18-46

entry.title: Corpus-informed vocabulary instruction in Bangladesh: a practical framework for EFL contexts
entry.summary: Authors: Shajadul Alam Sweet, Md. Nurul Kabir Emon, Sadia Khandokar Mim, Fakhrul Islam Mahim, Mahfuj Hosen, Partho Biswas, Easmin Sultana, Md. Mehedi Hasan Emon DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2025-0025 Pages: Page range: 47-73

entry.title: Walking in different shoes: unveiling the attitudes of Chinese university teachers and students towards generative AI
entry.summary: Authors: Ling Xia, Helen Beech DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2024-0031 Pages: Page range: 74-102

entry.title: Examining Chinese EFL learners’ acceptance of mobile-assisted vocabulary learning applications and its influencing factors
entry.summary: Authors: Yining Han, Chen Chen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2024-0005 Pages: Page range: 103-131

entry.title: Emerging trends in CALL in the age of GenAI: review of the 2025 ChinaCALL conference
entry.summary: Authors: Jinlan Tang, Shuai Zhang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2025-0038 Pages: Page range: 132-142

entry.title: Critiquing research published in SSCI and ESCI CALL journals between 2023 and 2024: a research design perspective
entry.summary: Authors: Junhong Xiao, Yiwei Peng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2025-0015 Pages: Page range: 143-176

entry.title: Christopher Joseph Jenks:New frontiers in language and technology
entry.summary: Authors: Lianjie Zhao, Ruiqi Fan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jccall-2023-0022 Pages: Page range: 177-183
